match.userMessage:
Camera holds a locked eye-level framing on the white vanity then slowly pushes in. Scarlett's hand reaches forward to lift the matte white box lid open, then fingertips press firmly into the coral lipstick bullet as direct window light catches its surface. Her delivery stays soft and reflective with minimal head movement and precise hand gestures. Bright natural light shifts slightly across the lid edge while faint dust motes drift in the beam.

[SCARLETT, soft reflective]: "One shade. One summer."

Ambient sounds: quiet studio room tone with faint window hum. lid sliding open, fingertip press on lipstick.
